# checkpointsase_status (Data Source)



## Example Usage

```terraform
data "checkpointsase_status" "current" {}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `status` (String) The current status of the Check Point SASE API.
